title: pteris calocarpa
intro: Pteris calocarpa, also known as the fern, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the family Pteridaceae. This plant is traditionally used in medicine due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it beneficial for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Pteris calocarpa include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, infusion, and extract, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
